# WebCraft Web Tasarım ve Dijital Pazarlama Ajansı
# https://www.webcraft.tr

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /_next/image

# Block Next.js build artifacts (not indexable content)
Disallow: /_next/static/
Disallow: /_next/media/

# Block auto-generated icon routes
Disallow: /apple-icon
Disallow: /icon

# Block API routes
Disallow: /api/

# Block admin areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /wp-admin/

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://www.webcraft.tr/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay for respectful crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# Allow all major search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Allow: /_next/image
Disallow: /_next/static/
Disallow: /_next/media/
Disallow: /apple-icon
Disallow: /icon
Disallow: /api/

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

# AI Crawlers - Explicitly allow AI models to crawl and index
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Omgilibot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# Block common bots that might cause issues
User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: AhrefsBot
Allow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Allow: /

Disallow: /wp-login.php
